name: nr-safety-alerts-backend
description: Sprint 1 starter — real-time alert ingestion for NR Safety Alerts CMT Dashboard

scripts.migrate: psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/001_init.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/002_geocode_and_sources.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/003_clustering_and_cities.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/004_sweeper_and_alerts.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/005_incidents_and_auth.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/006_acled.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f seeds/offices.sql
